supplier_about_subtitle: Basic supplier data and contact information (read-only).
supplier_about_help_body: Below are identification, address and contact details. If something is incorrect, contact the network administrator.
supplier_about_details_hint: Address and contact details linked to your account.
read_only_hint: Identification and address data can only be changed by the network administrator.
contact_hint: Contact details are used for communication within the franchise network integration.
supplier_logo_hint: JPG, PNG or WebP, max 2 MB.
supplier_profile_edit_hint: This information is visible within the platform.
supplier_notes_placeholder: Internal notes about this supplier account...
profile_save_failed: An error occurred while saving the profile.
logo_upload_failed: An error occurred while uploading the logo.
